overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking along a sunny coastal city promenade with palm trees, passing under a yellow pedestrian overpass, continuing past shops and gated areas, and finally sitting on a bench to smoke and observe futuristic traffic. The scene features bright midday lighting, cyberpunk architecture, and bustling urban activity.

ocean water visible beyond the promenade railing
large yellow elevated pedestrian bridge spanning across the street ahead
large electronic advertisement screen displaying animated content

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sunny waterfront promenade lined with palm trees. The ocean is visible to the left while futuristic vehicles drive on the multi-lane road to the right. Ahead, a distinctive yellow pedestrian overpass spans the street, and various vendor stalls line the walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway beneath yellow pedestrian overpass

events.description: character walks underneath the yellow pedestrian overpass, entering the shaded area beneath the structure
exiting the shadow of the overpass back into direct sunlight

agents.ego_description: passing through the covered area beneath the overpass alongside other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white tank top walking toward the camera

entered.detail: the underside of the yellow bridge structure now directly overhead
thick concrete columns supporting the overpass structure
black metal security fence with vertical bars

segments.scene_description: The character walks beneath the massive yellow pedestrian overpass, entering a shaded corridor with concrete support pillars. The lighting shifts to dappled shadows as the character passes through this semi-covered zone, with a black metal fence running along the left side.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy commercial sidewalk with shops and gated industrial area

events.description: character navigates around other pedestrians while maintaining forward momentum
passing by seated NPCs resting against a green shop wall

agents.ego_description: walking along the busy sidewalk passing various pedestrians and storefronts in a commercial district

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white and gray shirt walking ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: commercial building with green facade and large windows

segments.scene_description: Exiting the overpass shadow, the character continues along a bustling commercial sidewalk. A black metal fence runs along the left, separating the walkway from an industrial area, while various shops with green facades line the street. The character navigates through moderate pedestrian traffic as futuristic vehicles pass by on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: shop front seating area with street observation point

events.description: character stops walking and sits down on a concrete bench against the shop wall
character lights a cigarette and begins smoking while observing the street
heavy flow of futuristic vehicles and pedestrians passing by the seated character

agents.ego_description: sitting on a concrete bench smoking a cigarette and watching the street traffic and pedestrians pass by

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians crossing the street in front of the bench

entered.detail: low concrete seating bench against the shop wall where the character sits
solid green painted wall of the commercial building providing shade

segments.scene_description: The character sits down on a concrete bench against a green shop wall, lighting a cigarette. From this shaded vantage point, the character observes the steady flow of futuristic traffic and pedestrians crossing the busy multi-lane street. The camera remains stationary, capturing the urban atmosphere of the cyberpunk city street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a sunny coastal promenade that transitions from an open waterfront into a shaded urban corridor before settling into a stationary observation of city life. It begins with the character walking past palm trees and vendor stalls, with the ocean to the left and futuristic traffic flowing to the right. As the character advances, the scene shifts into a zone of dappled shadows while passing beneath a massive yellow pedestrian overpass supported by concrete pillars. The camera then emerges from the shade back into the bright midday light, following the character past green-facaded shops and a black metal fence that separates the bustling sidewalk from an industrial area. Finally, the movement ceases as the character sits on a concrete bench to light a cigarette, turning the perspective into a still vantage point overlooking the steady stream of cyberpunk traffic.
